payload.text:
All files are correctly registered. Here's a summary of everything implemented:

**New files created & registered in pbxproj:**
- `Woontech/Shared/CollectionExtensions.swift` — `Collection[safe:]` subscript (internal, accessible from tests)
- `Woontech/Features/Home/HeroInvestingCardView.swift` — date label, greeting, score card with `clampHeroScore()` helper
- `Woontech/Features/Home/InsightCardView.swift` — `InsightCardView`, `InsightPlaceholderCard`, `InsightsScrollView`

**Modified files:**
- `HeroInvestingProviding.swift` — protocol: `score`, `oneLiner`, `displayDate`; mock defaults (72 / "공격보다 관찰이 내 성향에 맞아요" / 2026-04-23)
- `InsightsProviding.swift` — `InsightCard` struct, `InsightsProviding.cards`, 3-card mock with badge/icon/title/desc/bottomLabel
- `DesignTokens.swift` — `tabooColor`=fireColor, `todayColor`=muted, `practiceColor`=woodColor
- `HomeDashboardView.swift` — replaced `Text("준비중")` with `HeroInvestingCardView` + `InsightsScrollView` wired to `navigationPath`
- `WoontechApp.swift` — `-mockHeroScore`, `-mockHeroDisplayName`, `-mockHeroDate` launch-arg parsing
- `HomeDashboardTests.swift` — 12 new unit tests (T1–T12: date formatting, score clamping, mock defaults, safe subscript)
- `HomeDashboardUITests.swift` — 8 new UI tests (T26–T33: routing, dynamic type, horizontal scroll)

IMPLEMENT_DONE
